base_personality: Wise and patient, the elder speaks with measured authority earned through decades of service to the village. Values tradition, knowledge, and the well-being of the community above all else. Slow to anger but unyielding once roused.

scripted_dialogue.greeting: Ah, welcome traveler. These old eyes have seen many pass through our village, but few with purpose such as yours.
scripted_dialogue.quest_hint: There is a disturbance in the balance of things. The old ways speak of trials that must be faced — not with sword alone, but with wisdom and resolve.
scripted_dialogue.hostile: You have betrayed the trust of this village. I will not suffer a deceiver in my home. Leave, before I call the guard.

greeting: Good day to you. What brings you to speak with an old soul?
Welcome, welcome. Sit, if you have time. There is always something to discuss.
I see you've come again. I trust the village treats you well?
ask_info: Hmm, let me think on that. The village has a long memory, and so do I.
Knowledge is not freely given — it must be earned through trust. But I will share what I can.
You ask the right questions. That is a good sign.
unknown: I'm afraid I don't quite follow. Perhaps you could speak more plainly?
These old ears may have missed your meaning. Try again, if you would.
That is not something I can help with, I'm afraid.
present_item: Ah, let me see... yes, this is significant. Thank you for showing me.
Interesting. I've seen something like this before, long ago.
Hold this carefully — it may be more important than you realize.
